name: grok
description: Grok as a peer implementer agent for Claude Code: delegate code to an isolated worktree, iterate with continue-run, integrate through verified handoff. Review, reason, and verify included. Not affiliated with xAI.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Security posture for live Grok runs: hardened (private home, sandbox, worktrees) or direct (your installed CLI)

notificationMode.title: Completion notifications
notificationMode.description: off, auto (background runs only), native, or webhook
